exerciseGoals.title: Exercise Goals
exerciseGoals.emptyState: Set your first exercise goal to start tracking strength progress.
exerciseGoals.deleteGoalMessage: This goal and its progress history will be permanently deleted.

goalTypes.1rmDescription: Set a strength target for a specific exercise.
goalTypes.consistencyDescription: Target a certain number of workouts per week.

creation.title: New Exercise Goal
creation.chooseType: What do you want to track?
creation.noHistoryForExercise: No workout history yet — we'll start tracking from your first session.
creation.projectionFaster: That's {{percent}}% faster than your current rate.
creation.projectionSlower: You're ahead of schedule by {{weeks}} weeks.
creation.realisticNudge: This target seems realistic for your current level.
creation.ambitiousNudge: That's an ambitious goal! It might take some time to get there.

card.stalling: No recent progress detected. Consider adjusting your training.
card.declining: Your estimated 1RM has trended down recently.
card.insufficientData: Log at least 3 sessions to see a projection.
card.noHistory: No sessions logged yet. Start tracking to see progress.
card.readyToAchieve: You have the strength to hit this! Go for the 1RM next workout.
